title: rosa coriifolia var. albida
intro: Rosa coriifolia var. albida, also known as the White Himalayan Rose, is a plant species in the Rosa genus native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which can help to soothe wounds and reduce fever. The health benefits of Rosa coriifolia var. albida include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. The plant can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, and tinctures for medicinal use, as well as being used in skincare products due to its antioxidant and anti-aging properties.
